_enabled: Master switch — when false, this plugin is skipped during indexing and Markdown files fall through to the generic text indexer.
_extensions: File extensions this plugin claims (lower-case, leading dot).
_max_file_size_bytes: Skip Markdown files larger than this many bytes (default 1 MB).
_extract_frontmatter: Pull YAML/TOML front-matter into a `frontmatter` node.
_extract_code_blocks: Index fenced code blocks (```lang …```) as `code_block` nodes.
_extract_comments: Extract `<!-- TODO -->`-style HTML comments as comment nodes.
_comment_tags: Tags surfaced as comment nodes when `extract_comments` is true.
_ignore_dirs: Folder names the indexer skips when this plugin is enabled.
_ignore_files: Glob patterns for files the indexer should skip.
_ignore_dir_markers: Sentinel file names that mark an entire directory as ignorable.
